channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Excessive litter and flytipping outside sancho house, e5 9pa, 22nd March
item.description:
A whole load of rubbish and fly tipping spilling onto the pavement outside Sancho House, Southwold Rd, E5 9PA
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay., 22nd March
item.description:
E-Lime Bikes Park in Overcrowding Parking Bay. Overloaded hire bikes parked dangerously blocking the road and pavement opposite Hippodrome Casino at Little Newport Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Cranley Building, 22nd March
item.description:
This was reported previously. ref: 9108658. The issue remains and requires an urgent action. Domestic sewage from the building has been overflowing onto the pavement for over a month. The area smells strongly and appears unhygienic, with wastewater running into the public drain. I have contacted Thames Water, and they confirmed that the pipework in question is the responsibility of the building owner rather than the water authority. As the issue has persisted for some time and is affecting the public pavement, I would be grateful if the Council could investigate the matter and arrange for the necessary repairs or enforcement action.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brooke's Market, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The food waste bin is tipped into the street, 22nd March
item.description:
The food waste bin is tipped into the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morning Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with no number plates outside 1 Huddleston Road N7, 22nd March
item.description:
Abandoned black Alfa Romeo car with no number plates outside 1 Huddleston Road N7. Please remove to free up CPZ space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Huddleston Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop leaning, 22nd March
item.description:
Bus stop leaning for a while

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickham Street, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in cover on pavement Danger to public, 22nd March
item.description:
Theirs a hole in a cover on the pavement which could cause people to fall down it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickham Street, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Every Sunday Edmonton van hire business is obstructing the pavement and blocking our garage entrance, 22nd March
item.description:
Aside from the inconvenience, this raises genuine concerns: Obstructed pedestrian access Limited visibility and manoeuvring space Potential issues for emergency access This is not a one-off, it happens every Sunday afternoon like clockwork. Photos attached show just a sample of the situation. Would it be possible for enforcement officers to visit during this time, or advise on how this can be addressed? Many thanks in advance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southbury Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped in the stairwell of Biddulph house, 22nd March
item.description:
The residents @ flat 10 Biddulph house have dumped a broken up wardrobe in the stairwell @ Biddulph house flats.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rideout Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste, Cushions, sofa by electricity box, 22nd March
item.description:
Black bags etc, large cushions, upturned sofa? Flytipped by electricity box (usual spot!) at end of Lavers Road near number 1 over the weekend. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chesholm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This vehicle has been sitting here with its engine runng for 40 mins, 22nd March
item.description:
Vehicle has come and sat here for 40 mins with its engine running

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Hopkins Street, Soho, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on the side of the road and path, 22nd March
item.description:
There is a significant amount of litter where the lorries park, with drivers discarding rubbish along the roadside. There are currently no bins in this area. Please could bins be installed, along with cameras if necessary, to help deter and identify those responsible? Additionally, along the pathway on the opposite side of the road, past Tesco, there are also no bins available. As a result, litter has built up along the pathway and surrounding grass banks. Please could more bins be installed in this area, and the litter cleared. Cameras could also be considered if needed to help prevent further issues.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A223, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree roots, 22nd March
item.description:
Treet roots pushing the pavement up. I have to walk with a stick and find it now very difficult to walk along The Chase
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Anne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Loads of sickening rubbish spread out and overflowing, 22nd March
item.description:
